text:
Clean. The root cause was the Relay API returning the native token (SOL/ETH/etc.) twice in the currency list — once as a native entry and once as a regular listed token with the same address. The fix:

- Added a `dedupCurrencies` helper that deduplicates by `chainId:address` key
- Applied it at every point currencies are fetched and stored (`loadCurrencies`, `loadWalletTokens`, batch chain loader)
- Also applied it at render time on `allCurrencies` before filtering, so even if external search results overlap with the main list, no duplicates appear
